diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -35,6 +35,26 @@
         h, _ = self.gru(x)

         h = self.dropout(h)

         logits = self.out(h) # [B, T, num_skills]

+        return logits

+

+class DKT_Concat(nn.Module):

+    def __init__(self, num_skills, embed_dim=256, hidden_dim=256, num_layers=2, dropout=0.2):

+        super().__init__()

+        self.num_skills = num_skills

+        self.skill_emb = nn.Embedding(num_skills, embed_dim)

+        self.correct_emb = nn.Embedding(2, embed_dim)

+        self.lstm = nn.LSTM(embed_dim * 2, hidden_dim, num_layers=num_layers, batch_first=True, dropout=dropout)

+        self.out = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_skills)

+        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)

+        

+    def forward(self, skill_ids, corrects):

+        s_emb = self.skill_emb(skill_ids)

+        c_emb = self.correct_emb(corrects)

+        x = torch.cat([s_emb, c_emb], dim=-1)

+        x = self.dropout(x)

+        h, _ = self.lstm(x)

+        h = self.dropout(h)

+        logits = self.out(h)

         return logits

 

 class DKT_SkillEmb(nn.Module):
